response.reasoning: Candidate has 10+ years of full-stack experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Current role at re:cinq involves TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators — directly matching the AI agent development requirement. Prior Optilyz role used TypeScript, AWS, React, MongoDB — strong stack alignment. Has Java experience (secondary stack requirement met). Demonstrates TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development from RIDE Capital. Founded GISCollective showing architecture/ownership skills with Kubernetes deployment. Concerns: React experience is somewhat limited to Optilyz; resume emphasizes Ember.js and DLang heavily which are not in the target stack; no explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest; Kotlin not mentioned (only Java). However, breadth of languages and stack-agnostic philosophy ('picking the right tool for the job') suggests easy ramp-up. Education matches (BS Computer Science). Strong community involvement via talks and workshops indicates communication skills.
strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js and AI agent/MCP work at current role
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops on testing) aligning with Vitest/quality focus
Architecture ownership demonstrated via GISCollective (Kubernetes, event-driven platform) and microservices at Dunnhumby
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed; framework-specific ramp-up needed
React exposure limited to one role (Optilyz); much of frontend history is Ember.js
Kotlin not mentioned (only Java), and recent emphasis on DLang may signal divergence from primary stack

key_factors.factor: AI agent / MCP experience at current role
TypeScript/Node.js depth with full-stack delivery track record

response.justification: Candidate substantially exceeds the experience bar and hits the hardest-to-find requirement (AI agent development with MCP) directly. Core TypeScript/Node.js, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, and testing discipline are all well-evidenced. Gaps around Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin specifics are addressable given the candidate's demonstrated polyglot adaptability and craftsmanship orientation. Worth interviewing to validate React depth and framework familiarity.
